name: Kaguya Otsutsuki
description:
She takes a little trip into a human village to monitor the lives of humans...

╰┈➤ ❝ [HOW STRANGE YOU ARE...] ❞

𝐓𝐚𝐠𝐬:

✧. 𝙰𝚗𝚢𝚙𝚘𝚟┊ 𝚂𝚆𝙵 𝚒𝚗𝚝𝚛𝚘 ┊ 𝙰𝙽𝙶𝚂𝚃┊𝚁𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚋𝚢, ANON!┊If you’re using janitor JLLM it’s not my fault for the bot going out of character.┊𝙱𝚘𝚝𝚑 𝚌𝚑𝚊𝚛 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚞𝚜𝚎𝚛 𝚊𝚛𝚎 𝚘𝚟𝚎𝚛 18.┊{{user}} can be anything/anyone.

I only post on janitor if you see my bots somewhere else report them!⚠️

𝙏𝙍𝙊𝙐𝘽𝙇𝙀𝙎𝙃𝙊𝙊𝙏𝙄𝙉𝙂

The bot is speaking for you? This is the fault of the LLM, not mine.
I recommend tweaking your advanced prompts or
your responses to the bot so that the LLM has something to respond to.
If you give it simple one liner responses, the LLM has no choice
but to move the roleplay forward by writing as you.
Use the enhance feature if this is still too difficult for you.

My bots are best used with OpenAI and Claude,
hence why my proxies will always remain open for
those that use those LLMs. But for those that still prefer to
use JLLM, I recommend taking a look at
kolach3's advanced prompts for a better experience.
OR PLEASE CHEACK OUT THIS RESOURCE FOR MORE INFORMATION OF BETTER LANGUAGE MODELS.

𝔻𝕀𝕊ℂ𝕃𝔸𝕀𝕄𝔼ℝ𝕊

ᴇɴɢʟɪꜱʜ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴍʏ ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ ʟᴀɴɢᴜᴀɢᴇ, ꜱᴏ ᴛʜᴇʀᴇ ᴍᴀʏ ʙᴇ ɢʀᴀᴍᴍᴀᴛɪᴄᴀʟ ᴍɪꜱᴛᴀᴋᴇꜱ.
ɪ ᴛʀʏ ᴛᴏ ᴄᴀᴛᴄʜ ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ᴇᴀᴄʜ ʀᴇʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ, ʙᴜᴛ ɪ'ᴍ ɴᴏᴛ ᴘᴇʀꜰᴇᴄᴛ.
ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ʟᴇᴛ ᴍᴇ ᴋɴᴏᴡ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴀɴᴅ
ɪ ᴡɪʟʟ ᴛʀʏ ᴛᴏ ꜰɪx ɪᴛ ǫᴜɪᴄᴋʟʏ!

𝕄𝕪 𝕣𝕖𝕢𝕦𝕖𝕤𝕥 𝕗𝕠𝕣𝕞 ℂ𝕠𝕞𝕖 ℂ𝕙𝕒𝕥 𝕎𝕚𝕥𝕙 𝕄𝕖 𝕆𝕟 𝕋𝕖𝕥𝕣𝕒𝕥𝕥𝕠!
